title: WheelJoint
description: A wheel attached to a chassis: free to **spin** (no rotation lock) and sprung along a **suspension axis** (a soft spring), but locked **laterally** (it cannot slide perpendicular to the axis). Optionally driven by a rotation motor and/or bounded by a suspension-travel limit. Used for vehicles. Solved in the sub-step loop, warm-started.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A wheel attached to a chassis: free to **spin** (no rotation lock) and sprung along a **suspension axis** (a soft spring), but locked **laterally** (it cannot slide perpendicular to the axis). Optionally driven by a rotation motor and/or bounded by a suspension-travel limit. Used for vehicles. Solved in the sub-step loop, warm-started.

members.name: enabled
members.description: When false, the joint is skipped by the solver (but still tracked by the world).

members.name: enableLimit
members.description: When true, the axis translation is constrained to [lowerTranslation, upperTranslation].

members.name: enableMotor
members.description: When true, the motor drives the wheel's spin toward motorSpeed.

members.name: hertz
members.description: Suspension spring frequency in Hz (0 = rigid axis).

members.name: lowerTranslation
members.description: Lower suspension-travel limit along the axis.

members.name: motorSpeed
members.description: Target relative angular velocity (rad/s) for the motor.

members.name: upperTranslation
members.description: Upper suspension-travel limit along the axis.
